hero.name: sumit kumar
hero.tagline: Crafting digital experiences with code and creativity.

about.intro: I'm a passionate frontend developer obsessed with crafting highly interactive, pixel-perfect user interfaces. I blend design with engineering to build experiences that look beautiful and perform flawlessly.

experience.title: Senior Computer Teacher
experience.description: Designing and delivering comprehensive computer science curriculum for secondary-level students. Mentoring junior faculty, supervising the school computer lab, and integrating modern teaching tools to enhance digital literacy and student engagement.

experience.title: Sales
experience.description: Handled outbound and inbound phone calls to promote and sell pharmaceutical products to clients. Built strong customer relationships, consistently met sales targets, and maintained accurate records of client interactions.

experience.title: Bachelor of Computer Application
experience.description: Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Computer Application with a focus on programming, web development, database management, and software engineering. Actively building practical skills through academic projects and hands-on coursework.

projects.title: Online Resume Builder with AI
projects.description: An intelligent web application that helps users create professional resumes with AI-driven suggestions and formatting.
